category_sources: Official Read the Docs page says Prog8 is a compiled programming language targeting the 8-bit 6502 CPU family.
source_facts.description describes Prog8 as a compiled programming language targeting the 8-bit 6502 CPU family.
display_name_sources: Official Read the Docs title uses Prog8.
source_facts.homepage is the official Prog8 documentation site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to Prog8 Read the Docs; official documentation is hosted at the stable Read the Docs URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/irmen/prog8, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies compiled language, 8-bit, and 6502 CPU targeting.
source_facts.executables lists the prog8c compiler executable.
